install_name.description: The name of the install for the included metrics.

metrics.description:
The requested metrics for an install.
Metrics will include daily usage metrics for the last 30 days.
Metrics will be sorted in descending order (most recent date first).

storage_refresh_expected_time.description:
Represents the estimated completion time (in UTC) for a refresh disk usage operation.
If a refresh is not in progress, then this field will be null.
